title: Star Wars Trilogy: Apprentice of the Force
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:Box-apotf.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Trilogy:
Apprentice of the Force'' |developer=[[Wikipedia:Ubisoft|Ubisoft]] |publisher=[[LucasArts]] |release date=[[September 21]], [[2004]]{{SWArchive|url=gaming/videogames/news/news20040712.html|text=Ubisoft and LucasArts brings ''Star Wars'' Trilogy to Game Boy Advance}} |closed= |upc= |engine=[[Wikipedia:Game Boy Advance|Game Boy Advance]] |genre=[[Wikipedia:Run and gun|Run and gun]] |modes= |ratings= |platforms=[[Wikipedia:Game Boy Advance|Game Boy Advance]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} '''''Star Wars Trilogy: Apprentice of the Force''''' is a [[2004]] Game Boy Advance platform game which includes [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. {{Game-stub}} ==Gameplay== This game follows the adventures of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in the original trilogy. You only play as Luke in this game. ===Levels=== '''Episode IV''' *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]: [[Lars homestead/Legends|Moisture farm]] *Tatooine: [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] *Tatooine: [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] *[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]: Interior *Death Star: Orbit *Death Star: [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Trench run]] '''Episode V''' *[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]: [[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] caves *Hoth: Battlefield *[[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]: Swamp *Dagobah: Training *[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]: [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] interior *Bespin: Cloud City battle '''Episode VI''' *[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]: Exterior *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] Palace: [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] pit *Jabba's Palace: [[Khetanna/Legends|Sail barge]] *[[Endor/Legends|Endor]]: [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|Speeder bikes]] *Endor: [[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *Endor: [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Final battle]] There is also a bonus survival mode where the player fights against enemies from all three episodes, but this level can only be played after completing the game. ===Enemies=== '''Episode IV''' *[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|Sandtroopers]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighters]] *[[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced x1]] '''Episode V''' *[[Wampa/Legends|Wampas]] *[[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] *[[Dark Spirit]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] '''Episode VI''' *[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards *[[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]] *[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] *[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *Darth Vader *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Owen Lars/Legends|Owen Lars]] *[[Beru Whitesun Lars/Legends|Beru Whitesun Lars]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] *[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] *[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] *[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] {{Mo}} *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] {{Mo}} *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Wioslea/Legends|Wioslea]] |organisms= *[[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]]
